case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. EVER EULISES MEJIA COLINDRES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $665.28 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COLINDRES, EVER EULISES MEJIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLINDRES, EVER EULISES MEJIA $665.28 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $745.28 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT COLINDRES, EVER EULISES MEJIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EVER EULISES MEJIA COLINDRES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $50.00 SERVED JAN-06-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COLINDRES, EVER EULISES MEJIA
